settings.browser.cookies.title: Browser Cookies Configuration
settings.browser.cookies.explanation: Some videos require authentication cookies from your browser to download. This is needed for age-restricted content, private videos, or region-locked content.
settings.browser.cookies.source.label: Browser:
settings.browser.cookies.note: Note: Your browser must be closed when downloading for cookies to be accessed properly.
settings.setup.step1: 1. On first launch, HVD checks for required tools (yt-dlp, FFmpeg, Deno).
settings.setup.step2: 2. If any are missing, a red banner appears — open Settings to download them.
settings.setup.step3: 3. For sites requiring login (YouTube, Vimeo), use the Authentication section in Settings.
settings.setup.step4: 4. Paste video URLs in the Downloads tab and click Add to Queue.
logs.label: Application Logs:

settings.auth.title: Authentication
settings.auth.description: Some sites require login. HVD uses its built-in browser for cookies — log in once per site and downloads will work.

settings.deps.failed.message: Failed to download {0}. Check the Logs tab for details.
settings.deps.update.title: Update yt-dlp
settings.deps.description: These tools are required for downloading. The app downloads them to bin/.

alert.ffmpeg.missing.content:
FFmpeg is not installed or not found in PATH. Thumbnail embedding may fail.

Install FFmpeg from ffmpeg.org or disable thumbnail embedding.

Continue anyway?
